questionHtml: Explain the cause of the radio-frequency emissions from a patient’s body during nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) imaging.
markschemeHtml:
use of strong magnetic field ✓

protons are aligned ✓

radio wave at «nuclear» resonant frequency flips «some of» them into higher energy state ✓

proton de-excites emitting energy at known «radio» wavelength/frequency/Larmor frequency ✓

«which can be located and detected»

meta.title: Explain the cause of the radio-frequency emissions from a patient’s body during nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) imaging.
